title: The Ethereum Protocol Stack
description: A visual breakdown of the layered components that make up the Ethereum blockchain, showing how they interact from the base infrastructure to the user-facing applications.
relationships: The Network Layer propagates transactions and blocks
The Consensus Layer secures the network and orders blocks
The Data Layer stores the cryptographically linked chain of blocks
The Execution Layer processes and validates smart contract code
The Application Layer interacts with the Execution Layer via transactions
